Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-16 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows two exceptionally strong long-term performers dominating the ranking. MPC (Marathon Petroleum) claims the #1 spot with a score of 93.0, posting impressive 10-year returns of 517% while outperforming SPY by 286% over the same period, though its momentum signal is moderate at 0.63. FUWAY exhibits even more extreme absolute returns—1,075% over 10 years and 688% over 5 years—with dramatically outperformed SPY/QQQ comparisons (844% and 612% respectively over 10 years), suggesting this may be a high-volatility or small-cap name with exceptional but potentially unstable growth. Both tickers pass all SMA moving average tests and maintain positive momentum flags, indicating technical strength across timeframes. The sharp contrast between MPC's measured outperformance against broad indices and FUWAY's extreme excess returns suggests investors should carefully evaluate whether FUWAY's gains reflect sustainable business fundamentals or concentrated exposure to a volatile secular trend.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
